page_metadata.biotools__summary: Collection of Java programs for structural biology and NMR spectroscopy. It’s programs analyze, annotate, parse, archive, and disseminate experimental NMR data deposited by authors world wide into the PDB and BMRB.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Collection of Java programs for structural biology and NMR spectroscopy. It’s programs analyze, annotate, parse, archive, and disseminate experimental NMR data deposited by authors world wide into the PDB and BMRB.
